name: Vahanna Tech Edge Acquisition I Corp. Class A Ordinary Shares
summary: Vahanna Tech Edge Acquisition I Corp. is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company is focused on identifying and acquiring a business in the technology sector. Vahanna Tech Edge Acquisition I Corp. is based in New York, USA.
